title: staff — authorization policies
description: Two policies, one per owned model. Each policy composes the ResolveScope middleware's decision: a caller with scope 'branch:X' can only see/act on staff/coaches in branch X. Every ability defers to spatie/laravel-permission for the base check, then layers scope narrowing + PII / compensation gates. Two special permissions carry `staff.` prefix even though they read like actions: `staff.view.compensation` and `staff.view.emergency_contact` (both permission-gated field-access filters, not full policies). The redactor pipeline applies these on egress — a caller with `staff.view` but WITHOUT `staff.view.compensation` sees the Staff row with compensation_* fields stripped from the wire projection.

abilities.scope: any tenant member with staff feature; narrows to caller's active branch scope when set
same as viewAny + self-view allowed via .own suffix (`staff.view.own` narrows to WHERE user_id = current_user_id)
hr + branch_manager + admin + owner. Distinct from staff.create — the hire action includes slot consumption + welcome-notification cascade
hr + branch_manager (own branch) + admin + owner. Compensation + emergency contact fields additionally require the field-level permissions below
admin + owner only. Precondition: employment_status='offboarded'
admin + owner only. Atomic route — demotes existing manager + promotes this staff in one transaction
same permission — promote and demote are one capability
hr + branch_manager (own branch) + admin + owner. Leave notes may be visible only to HR (leave_type not visible to peers)
hr + admin + owner only. Branch managers CANNOT unilaterally suspend — audit + compliance safeguard against retaliatory disciplinary use
hr + admin + owner. The route supports `cascade=true` which archives the linked Coach + removes team memberships in the same transaction (requires additional `staff.offboard.cascade` permission)
same permission as hire — rehire is a hire path

hr + owner. The redactor strips compensation_* fields when the caller lacks this. Additionally, a Staff can view their own compensation via `staff.view.compensation.own` (narrows to user_id = current_user_id)
hr + owner only. Distinct permission — the observer refuses writes without this even if caller has staff.update
hr + branch_manager (own branch) + owner. Redactor strips fields for others. `staff.view.emergency_contact.own` allows self-view
hr + owner. Additionally, the staff themselves may update their OWN emergency contact via the /me/staff/emergency-contact route (permission `staff.manage.emergency_contact.own`)
requires staff_org_chart entitlement + own-report-only when caller isn't hr/owner (a manager sees their own tree; hr + owner see everyone)
super_admin only. Emits a signed audit CSV over the last N compensation changes across all tenants. Every invocation is audit-critical + logged to compliance.
any tenant member; narrows to active branch scope
hr + admin + owner + branch_manager (own branch). Consumes coach_slot entitlement

hr + branch_manager (own branch) + admin + owner. Self-update by the coach themselves is via /me/coach with a subset of fields (bio, avatar via user->profile, availability_pattern, public_email, public_phone, languages) — permission `coach.update.own`
admin + owner only. Precondition: status='archived'
coach.update permission is sufficient — pause is not a disciplinary action
hr + admin + owner. Archive is the pre-delete transition — coach loses team assignments
hr + coach themselves (`coach.manage.certifications.own`) + admin + owner. Coaches can add their own certifications; HR verifies them when coach_certifications_verified entitlement is on
hr + owner only. Requires coach_certifications_verified entitlement. Uploads a signed doc + promotes certification from pending_verification → verified
hr + admin + owner. The coach themselves cannot change their primary sport — that's an org-level classification decision
hr + branch_manager + admin + owner. Coach themselves can manage OWN availability via `coach.manage.availability.own`

PUBLIC — no auth required. Renders the coach's public profile (bio, avatar, primary sport, verified certifications, rating when coach_rating_display entitlement is on). Requires only that the parent tenant's public directory is enabled.
